raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 84 creates a 'right to cure' opportunity for businesses to fix construction-related deficiencies.",
    "SB 84 grants businesses the ability to fix a violation and increase access for people with disabilities.",
    "The bill aims to reduce lawsuit abuse that harms businesses.",
    "SB 84 requires that businesses be given notice of a violation and the opportunity to cure or fix it before a lawsuit can be filed.",
    "This 'right to cure' benefit will protect the rights of individuals with disabilities.",
    "SB 84 addresses the concerns of immigrant small business owners who may face pressure to settle unfounded lawsuits.",
    "The legislation aims to ensure a fair approach that respects the rights of people with disabilities while supporting small businesses."
  ]
}
```
